claim_boundary: Software motif-causality suite with seeded motif-diverse graph; not hardware/on-chip motif evidence.

intact.description: Motif-diverse lifecycle CRA; the motif structure under test.
intact.label: intact motif graph

monolithic_same_capacity.description: Fixed max-pool CRA with graph message passing disabled.
monolithic_same_capacity.label: monolithic same capacity

motif_shuffled.description: Same source/target/weights as intact with motif labels shuffled.
motif_shuffled.label: motif-label shuffled graph

no_feedback.description: Seeded graph with feedback/recurrent edges removed before the run.
no_feedback.label: no feedback motif

no_feedforward.description: Seeded graph with feedforward edges removed before the run.
no_feedforward.label: no feedforward motif

no_lateral.description: Seeded graph with lateral coordination and lateral inhibition removed.
no_lateral.label: no lateral motif

no_wta.description: All-polyps readout plus no inhibitory lateral motif edges.
no_wta.label: no WTA / lateral inhibition

random_graph_same_edge_count.description: Same number and weight signs as intact, but randomized source/target pairs.
random_graph_same_edge_count.label: random graph same edge count
